title: Complex Form
excerpt:
I have a complex form with some calculations that I would like to place in Monday. I have a mock-up in Google Sheets: 


How can I put this form/spreadsheet in Monday?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@alanhalley ,
To transfer your complex form with calculations from Google Sheets to monday.com, follow these steps:
1. Prepare Your Google Sheet
2. Create a New Board in monday.com
3. Import Data from Google Sheet to monday.com
Connect your Google Sheet to monday.com using the Monday Apps integration.Map the corresponding columns from your Google Sheet to the respective columns in your monday.com board.Initiate the data import process to transfer your form data into monday.com.
4. Replicate Formulas in monday.com
5. Enhance the Form in monday.com
6. Connect Form Responses to monday.com Board
7. Test and Refine Your Form

posts.author: alanhalley (Alan Halley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Should I use a Monday Form? I have 36 questions that are currently on four pages (Google Sheets tabs). Seems like it would be a very long form for users to scroll through. Your thoughts?

Thanks.

Alan

posts.author: alanhalley (Alan Halley)
posts.cookedHtml:
I embedded an Excel file in a board. It works well enough.

Alan
